# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "vmCount": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 2,
      "minValue": 1,
      "maxValue": 50
    },
    "vmNamePrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "devvm"
    },
    "adminUsername": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "azureuser"
    },
    "adminPasswordOrSshKey": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "For Windows: admin password. For Linux: SSH public key string."
      }
    },
    "osType": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Linux",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Linux",
        "Windows"
      ]
    },
    "linuxImagePublisher": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Canonical"
    },
    "linuxImageOffer": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "0001-com-ubuntu-server-jammy"
    },
    "linuxImageSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "22_04-lts-gen2"
    },
    "windowsImagePublisher": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "MicrosoftWindowsServer"
    },
    "windowsImageOffer": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "WindowsServer"
    },
    "windowsImageSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "2022-datacenter-g2"
    },
    "vmSize": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_B2s"
    },
    "vnetAddressPrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "10.10.0.0/16"
    },
    "subnetAddressPrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "10.10.1.0/24"
    },
    "publicIpSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Standard",
        "Basic"
      ]
    },
    "publicIpAllocationMethod": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Static",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Static",
        "Dynamic"
      ]
    },
    "openSsh": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "openRdp": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true
    },
    "allowedSourceAddressPrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "*",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Restrict inbound management traffic. Use your public IP/CIDR (e.g., 203.0.113.10/32). '*' allows from anywhere."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "vnetName": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-vnet')]",
    "subnetName": "default",
    "nsgName": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-nsg')]",
    "linuxImage": {
      "publisher": "[parameters('linuxImagePublisher')]",
      "offer": "[parameters('linuxImageOffer')]",
      "sku": "[parameters('linuxImageSku')]",
      "version": "latest"
    },
    "windowsImage": {
      "publisher": "[parameters('windowsImagePublisher')]",
      "offer": "[parameters('windowsImageOffer')]",
      "sku": "[parameters('windowsImageSku')]",
      "version": "latest"
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks",
      "apiVersion": "2024-01-01",
      "name": "[variables('vnetName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "addressSpace": {
          "addressPrefixes": [
            "[parameters('vnetAddressPrefix')]"
          ]
        },
        "subnets": [
          {
            "name": "[variables('subnetName')]",
            "properties": {
              "addressPrefix": "[parameters('subnetAddressPrefix')]",
              "networkSecurityGroup": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"
              }
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', variables('nsgName'))]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
      "apiVersion": "2024-01-01",
      "name": "[variables('nsgName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "securityRules": [
          {
            "name": "Allow-SSH",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow SSH from allowed source",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "22",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "[parameters('allowedSourceAddressPrefix')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 1000,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            },
            "condition": "[parameters('openSsh')]"
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-RDP",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow RDP from allowed source",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "3389",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "[parameters('allowedSourceAddressPrefix')]",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 1010,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            },
            "condition": "[parameters('openRdp')]"
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses",
      "apiVersion": "2024-01-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-pip-', copyIndex())]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('publicIpSku')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "publicIPAllocationMethod": "[parameters('publicIpAllocationMethod')]",
        "publicIPAddressVersion": "IPv4"
      },
      "copy": {
        "name": "publicIpCopy",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces",
      "apiVersion": "2024-01-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-nic-', copyIndex())]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "ipConfigurations": [
          {
            "name": "ipconfig1",
            "properties": {
              "privateIPAllocationMethod": "Dynamic",
              "publicIPAddress": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-pip-', copyIndex()))]"
              },
              "subnet": {
                "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', variables('vnetName'), variables('subnetName'))]"
              }
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', variables('vnetName'))]",
        "publicIpCopy"
      ],
      "copy": {
        "name": "nicCopy",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines",
      "apiVersion": "2024-03-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-', copyIndex())]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      },
      "properties": {
        "hardwareProfile": {
          "vmSize": "[parameters('vmSize')]"
        },
        "storageProfile": {
          "imageReference": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), variables('linuxImage'), variables('windowsImage'))]",
          "osDisk": {
            "createOption": "FromImage",
            "managedDisk": {
              "storageAccountType": "Premium_LRS"
            }
          }
        },
        "osProfile": {
          "computerName": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-', copyIndex())]",
          "adminUsername": "[parameters('adminUsername')]",
          "adminPassword": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), parameters('adminPasswordOrSshKey'), json('null'))]",
          "linuxConfiguration": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Linux'), json(concat('{\"disablePasswordAuthentication\":true,\"ssh\":{\"publicKeys\":[{\"path\":\"/home/', parameters('adminUsername'), '/.ssh/authorized_keys\",\"keyData\":\"', replace(parameters('adminPasswordOrSshKey'), '\"', '\\\"'), '\"}]}}')), json('null'))]",
          "windowsConfiguration": "[if(equals(parameters('osType'), 'Windows'), json('{\"enableAutomaticUpdates\":true}'), json('null'))]"
        },
        "networkProfile": {
          "networkInterfaces": [
            {
              "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-nic-', copyIndex()))]"
            }
          ]
        }
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "nicCopy"
      ],
      "copy": {
        "name": "vmCopy",
        "count": "[parameters('vmCount')]"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "vmPublicIps": {
      "type": "array",
      "value": "[array(range(0, parameters('vmCount'))).map(i => reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-pip-', i)), '2024-01-01').ipAddress)]"
    },
    "vmPublicIpResourceIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "value": "[array(range(0, parameters('vmCount'))).map(i => resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-pip-', i)))]"
    },
    "vmNames": {
      "type": "array",
      "value": "[array(range(0, parameters('vmCount'))).map(i => concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-', i))]"
    }
  }
}
